name: Editorial Team
shortBio: An editorial desk focused on practical China trip planning, route logic, and traveler-facing booking basics.
fullBio: The Editorial Team reviews destination hubs, trip-planning guides, and practical travel topics with a focus on clarity, route logic, and usable travel decisions. The goal is to turn complex China trip-planning questions into clear English guidance that helps readers choose better city combinations, hotel areas, transport plans, and next steps.
expertise: Editorial review of traveler-facing planning content
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for factual clarity, route logic, traveler usefulness, and whether the advice still matches current booking habits, transport realities, and destination-planning needs.
seoDescription: Meet the editorial team behind China Travel Notes and see how city guides and planning articles are reviewed.
